title: ficus exasperata
intro: Ficus exasperata, also known as the 'tiger bark fig', is a species of tree native to tropical regions in Australia and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Ficus exasperata has been associated with several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas and infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
